input.agent_prompt: Classify the ICP segment for Jetstream Data and draft the email opening. Note: Series B $18M closed 60 days ago, but a 12% layoff happened 90 days ago.

dimensions.name: no_growth_pitch
dimensions.check: 'scale your team' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'rapid growth' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'growing fast' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'expand your' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-001] Recent layoff (90d) more recent than funding (60d). Must not send growth pitch to post-layoff company.
